name: vscode-theme-mapper
description: Automatically assign a VS Code theme based on the current workspace.

autoAssign.enabled.description: Enable automatic theme assignment for the active workspace.

autoAssign.candidateMode.description: Kind filter applied to installed themes before autoAssign.candidateThemes regex matching.

autoAssign.candidateThemes.description: Regular expression patterns further filtering the kind-filtered installed theme labels. Leave empty to keep every theme selected by autoAssign.candidateMode. Each entry is compiled as a JavaScript RegExp; use ^ and $ to anchor for exact match.

autoAssign.hashSalt.description: Optional salt used to reshuffle deterministic theme assignment.

autoAssign.onlyWhenUnset.description: Do not overwrite explicit workspace theme settings unless the current workspace theme was previously applied by Theme Mapper.

autoAssign.nameSource.description: Priority-ordered sources used to resolve the project name.

autoAssign.pathname.description: How pathname is resolved when pathname is included in autoAssign.nameSource.

autoAssign.includePaths.description: Only apply automatic assignment when the target workspace path is under one of these paths.

autoAssign.excludePaths.description: Skip automatic assignment when the target workspace path is under one of these paths.
